package.name: voice_mod
package.description: dorai real-time mic-array front-end. Auto-detects a USB microphone array, async-resamples every mic to a common 16 kHz master timeline with per-mic clock-drift correction, runs the dorai_beamformer.ort multichannel beamformer continuously in real time, and publishes the enhanced single-channel speech on /dorai_clean_audio in configurable N-second frames (default 10 s).
